mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-iborderplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderDt - 입고 적치 상세 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY IBHDKEY, CAST(IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC)
mapper.sql: /* wms-inbound-iborderplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderPlcmsql - 입고 적치 적치 조회 SQL */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.IBCFSEQNO , A.SEQNO , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , A.IVATKEY , A.ASRTYN , CTG3.CTGNM AS LV1_CTGNM , CTG2.CTGNM AS LV2_CTGNM , CTG1.CTGNM AS LV3_CTGNM , A.PRDCTDATE , A.EXPDATE , B.ICGRPKEY , A.LCKEY , COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(C.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_INN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_CTN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / (NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) * NULLIF(COALESCE(D.CPPQTY, 0), 0)), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_PLT , A.CNTRNO , A.IBCFCNTRNO , A.BFCHGEXPDATE , E.IVCNTRMGMTYN , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_PLCM_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = C.ICUNITKEY AND C.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = D.ICUNITKEY AND D.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = E.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG1 ON A.CTKEY = CTG1.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = CTG1.OWKEY AND B.CTGKEY = CTG1.CTGKEY AND CTG1.CTGLV = '3' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG2 ON CTG1.CTKEY = CTG2.CTKEY AND CTG1.OWKEY = CTG2.OWKEY AND CTG1.UPRCTGKEY = CTG2.CTGKEY AND CTG2.CTGLV = '2' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG3 ON CTG2.CTKEY = CTG3.CTKEY AND CTG2.OWKEY = CTG3.OWKEY AND CTG2.UPRCTGKEY = CTG3.CTGKEY AND CTG3.CTGLV = '1' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey} AND A.IBCFCNTRNO = #{ibcfcntrno}
mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-iborderplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderPlcm - 입고 적치 상세 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY IBHDKEY, CAST(IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC), IBCFSEQNO, SEQNO

/* wms-inbound-iborderplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPlcmMstIc - 상품 마스터 조회 */ SELECT A.* , B.WEIGHT , B.ICUNITQTY , CASE WHEN B.WIDTH = 0 OR B.DEPTH = 0 OR B.HEIGHT = 0 OR B.WEIGHT = 0 THEN 'N' WHEN A.ROBSORTERICYN IS NULL OR A.CUSHNMEPCKGYN IS NULL OR A.BARCODEATTACHYN IS NULL OR A.POLYBAGPCKGYN IS NULL OR A.PCKGOVLPYN IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN A.PCKGOVLPYN = 'Y' AND (A.OVLPPCKGWIDTHVAL = 0 AND A.OVLPPCKGDEPTHVAL = 0 AND A.OVLPPCKGHEIGHTVAL = 0) THEN 'N' WHEN A.PCKGFOLDYN IS NULL OR A.HIGHFRQNCYDMGYN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS ICYN FROM TWORK_MST_IC A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND B.ICUNITTYPECD = 'EA' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey}

/* wms-inbound-iborderplcm-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatxlcList - 재고 테이블 조회 */ SELECT IVLC.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , IVLC.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , IVLC.LCKEY /* 로케이션 코드 */ , IVLC.ICKEY /* 상품코드 */ , IVLC.IVATKEY /* 재고속성코드 */ , IVLC.IVSERIALNO /* 용기번호 */ , IVLC.TOTQTY , IVLC.AVQTY , IVLC.ALQTY , IVLC.HOLDQTY , LC.IVCNTRMGMTYN /* 용기관리여부 */ FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY WHERE IVLC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVLC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVLC.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVLC.TOTQTY > 0
